mnemonics.title: Arithmetic Test Operators
mnemonics.content: Think of the operators as abbreviations: **EQ**ual, **N**ot **E**qual, **G**reater **T**han, **L**ess **T**han, Greater than or **E**qual, Less than or **E**qual. So: -eq, -ne, -gt, -lt, -ge, -le.

mnemonics.title: Loop Control Flow
mnemonics.content: **B**reak **B**ails (exits the loop entirely). **C**ontinue **C**arries on (to the next iteration).

mnemonics.title: Case Statement Structure
mnemonics.content: The structure spells itself out: **CASE** variable **IN**) pattern) commands ;; **ESAC**. Remember, `esac` is `case` backwards.
